Introducing Element, the new Proofpoint Partner Program

At Proofpoint, we believe extraordinary things can be achieved when you combine the right elements. That’s why we’ve created a new partner program, ‘Element’, consisting of three components designed to help you succeed:

  • Providing value
  • Protecting people and the data they create
  • Powering revenue

But, those elements are nothing without a powerful part of the equation — you. United, we'll deliver more value than either could on our own.

Working together, we’ll provide your customers with a market-leading set of cybersecurity products that give them complete peace of mind. Our dedicated team will ensure you have everything you need to land and expand with extensive sales enablement, convenient training resources, marketing development and technical support. As a result, you’ll enjoy enhanced customer relationships, higher win rates and boosted revenue.

Be part of something bigger

As an Element partner, you'll benefit from a program that:

 
Protects people and defends data

We’ll safeguard your customers’ people and the data they create with a market-leading portfolio of the strongest cybersecurity and compliance solutions available.

 
Provides value

We’ll provide your customers with an integrated suite of cloud-based solutions - across email, the cloud, social media and the web - that simplify customer deployents and enable you to provide more value than ever before.

 
Powers revenue

The combination of our recurring revenue model, opportunities to expand and upsell, and yearly renewal rate of more than 90%, ensures you can maximize growth and increase revenue.

Apply Now >>                                                                         

PARTNERSHIP

Much of our success is based on strong, trustworthy relationships with our partners    — our people and your people, protecting people together. 

ENABLEMENT

Increase your Proofpoint sales and technical expertise in our solutions with FREE eLearning courses, ILT/vILT trainings and monthly webinars.

SALES & MARKETING

Increase your leads using our competitive guides, sales and prospecting tools, co-branding library and demand generation kits.

GROWTH POTENTIAL

We recognize the impact and  role partners play in protecting our customers, that’s why we’re dedicated to investing in your growth and success.

Protecting People Together

Ready to harness the power of Element?

Enter your email address to get started. If your company is already a Proofpoint channel partner, you can also apply for access here.
